title: alchemilla plicatula var. velebitica
intro: Alchemilla plicatula var. velebitica, also known as the Velebit alpine lady's mantle, is a variety of the Alchemilla plicatula plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This perennial herb is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating skin irritations, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. Alchemilla plicatula var. velebitica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary depending on regional regulations and traditional practices.
